title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on tasks including drug toxicity prediction, cancer drug discovery, antibody design, and drug repurposing.
